Off Calendar Jul-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-30-2023 Continued To Jul-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-21-2023 Continued To Jul-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Peterson, via Zoom, for and with Fanta Pawlowski, Petitioner; Guadalupe Gamino, via Zoom, for and with David Rodriguez, Objector; Evan Winet, via Zoom, for four (4) heirs at law; Ethena Caldas, and Susan Sanchez, in court, in propria persona, interested parties.

At the query of the court, Mr. Gamino reports as to why he has not filed a competing petition. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the instant petition and Mr. Gamino's objection. Upon conclusion of oral argument, the court advises of its intent to grant the instant petition.

The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

***After hearing (12/21/22): Ms. Caldas advises that she is requesting to be appointed co-Administrator in this matter and offers advocacy on behalf of her request. At the query of the court, Ms. Caldas advises that she would have stated her position on the record but was unaware of the court's protocol to do so and did not want to interrupt court proceedings. After consideration, the court advises that it is taking her request under submission.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Continued To Dec-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
